message:
style: rustfmt formatting in extension_dispatcher, rpc, and scheduler

Apply rustfmt-consistent formatting to three source files:

- extension_dispatcher.rs: collapse multi-line method chain
  `self.snapshot.lookup(...)` onto a single line where it fits
  within the line-length limit
- rpc.rs: reformat chained `.header.provider.clone_from(...)`,
  `.header.model_id.clone_from(...)`, `.header.thinking_level.clone_from(...)`
  and `.entries_for_current_path().into_iter().cloned().collect()`
  chains to vertical style matching rustfmt 2024 edition defaults;
  remove extraneous blank line before `apply_model_change` doc-comment
- scheduler.rs: reformat `assert!(seen.iter().all(...))` to
  standard vertical closure layout

No behavioral changes — pure whitespace/line-break adjustments.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
